checkpoints.name: Safety checkpoint: delete · peer node **collaboration moat** — the backend primitives that make Dev2 fundamentally different from "another AI chat + canvas tool" — is now **100% implemented** across all 8 features (Phases 0–4). These are the traceable intent primitives defined in the [Feature PRDs](../01-product/feature-detail/README.md) and backed by [ADRs 018–025](../02-adr/00-INDEX.md). Each feature ties back to one of three [Killer Features](../01-product/KILLER_FEATURES.md).

peer node **collaboration moat** — the backend primitives that make Dev2 fundamentally different from "another AI chat + canvas tool" — is now **100% implemented** across all 8 features (Phases 0–4). These are the traceable intent primitives defined in the [Feature PRDs](../01-product/feature-detail/README.md) and backed by [ADRs 018–025](../02-adr/00-INDEX.md). Dev2 has a solid **platform foundation** (~85% complete): tldraw canvas, Socket.IO real-time, contextual chat, AI personas with tool calling, MinIO file storage, MCP protocol, OpenTelemetry observability, dual authentication.
